decisions.description: Checks to see if a Rejected measure spend record was found in the previous get record node.
decisions.name: Unapproved_Measure_Spend_found
decisions.label: Unapproved Measure Spend found?

Flow.description: Screen Flow that allows PSOs to approve, decline, return, hold or pre approve a submitted batch, supplying a reason to the GR
Flow.label: ABS - PSO Batch Approval

recordLookups.description: Gets any Measure Spends related to this Batch that have a Status of "Rejected"
recordLookups.name: Get_Unapproved_Measure_Spends
recordLookups.label: Get Unapproved Measure Spends

fields.name: Please_provide_narrative_as_to_why_the_batch_has_been_Approved
fields.fieldText: Please provide narrative as to why the batch has been Approved.

fields.name: Please_provide_narrative_as_to_why_the_batch_has_been_Held
fields.fieldText: Please provide narrative as to why the batch has been Held.

fields.name: Please_provide_narrative_as_to_why_the_batch_has_been_returned
fields.fieldText: Please provide narrative as to why the batch has been Returned.

fields.name: Please_provide_narrative_as_to_why_the_batch_has_been_Pre_Approved
fields.fieldText: Please provide narrative as to why the batch has been Pre Approved.

fields.name: Please_provide_narrative_as_to_why_the_batch_has_been_Rejected
fields.fieldText: Please provide narrative as to why the batch has been Not Approved.

fields.name: BatchApprovalTitle
fields.fieldText: Batch Approval

fields.name: Version_changes_justification
fields.fieldText: Version changes justification

fields.name: ValidationDisplayText
fields.fieldText:
Please review the following validation points to ensure the batch submission is complete and accurate. All validations must be Green or Amber in order for the batch to be approved.  Warning flags in Amber should always be approved except in very exceptional circumstances (where it would no longer be feasible for the project to meet cost cap or measure price limit rules by project closure if the batch was to be accepted).  If any validations are flagged as red, the batch cannot be approved and should be 'returned' for amendments. 


﻿Warnings in Amber will NOT stop the batch from being Approved

fields.name: CostValidationHeaderDisplay
fields.fieldText: Cost Validation

fields.name: noCostIssuesHeader
fields.fieldText: All Costs have validated correctly

fields.name: BatchCostsIncreasedWArning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: Costs on this batch have increased from the last approved version

fields.name: inqualCostsWarningDisplay
fields.fieldText: Error: The Total Costs inputted on the Spend per Homes screens does not equal the total costs of the Measures plus Capital Expenditures

fields.name: costCapValidationTitle
fields.fieldText: Average Cost Cap Validation

fields.name: CostCapsValidated
fields.fieldText: All Average Cost Caps have validated correctly

fields.name: OOEP_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Owner Occupied Homes for the Energy Performance pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.EP_Owner_Occupied_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varOOEPTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: OOLCH_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Owner Occupied Homes for the Low Carbon Heat pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.LCH_Owner_Occupied_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varOOLCHTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: PR100EP_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Private Rented First Homes for the Energy Performance pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.EP_Private_Rented_First_Home_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varPR100EPTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: PR100LCH_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Private Rented First Homes for the Low Carbon Heat pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.LCH_Private_Rented_First_Home_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varPR100LCHTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: PR50EP_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Private Rented Other Homes for the Energy Performance pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.EP_Private_Rented_other_Homes_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varPR50EPTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: PR50LCH_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Private Rented Other Homes for the Low Carbon Heat pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.LCH_Private_Rented_Other_Homes_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varPR50LCHTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: SHEP_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Social Housing Homes for the Energy Performance pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.EP_Social_Rented_Cost_Cap__c} with an average spend of {!varSHEPTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: SHLCH_Grant_Per_House_All_Approved
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The Average Cost Cap for Social Housing Homes for the Low Carbon Heat pot has been breached by this batch, cap of £{!Get_Funding_Scheme.LCH_Social_Rented_Cost_Cap__c}with an average spend of {!varSHLCHTenureTypeAverage}

fields.name: averagePriceLimitValidatonTitle
fields.fieldText: Average Measure Price Limit Validation

fields.name: mplValidated
fields.fieldText: {!varAverageMeasurePriceLimitWarnings}

fields.name: TotalCost
fields.fieldText: Baseline Spend Validation

fields.name: CostValidationWarning
fields.fieldText: All Baseline Spends have validated correctly

fields.name: FY1CostWarning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Financial Year {!batch.FY1_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend Baseline will be breached by this batch

fields.name: FY2CostWarning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Financial Year {!batch.FY2_Baseline__r.Parent_Time_Period__r.Time_Period_Sequence_Number__c} Spend Baseline will be breached by this batch

fields.name: awardCostWarning
fields.fieldText: WARNING: Award Spend Baseline will be breached by this batch

fields.name: prMatchedText
fields.fieldText:
50%+ matched funding for PRS

(50% funded homes)

fields.name: PrivateRentedLandlordFunding
fields.fieldText: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is at the appropriate levels for this batch

fields.name: PrivateRentedLandlordFundingWarning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is at the inadequate for this batch

fields.name: socialMatchedText
fields.fieldText:
50%+ matched funding for Social Homes

(50% funded homes)﻿

fields.name: SocialHomesLandlordFunding
fields.fieldText: Social Homes Matched Landlord Funding is at the appropriate levels for this batch

fields.name: SocialHomesLandlordFundingWArning
fields.fieldText: ERROR: Private Rented Matched Landlord Funding is at the inadequate for this batch

fields.name: greenAmber
fields.fieldText: Green/Amber CMs/GR Leads

fields.name: AllGreenDisplay
fields.fieldText: All Local Authorities on the batch are Green Lighted

fields.name: AmberDisplay
fields.fieldText: WARNING: One or more Local Authorities on the batch are Amber Lighted

fields.name: RedDisplay
fields.fieldText: WARNING: One or more Local Authorities on the batch are Red Lighted﻿

fields.name: Homes
fields.fieldText: Homes

fields.name: HomesSuccessful
fields.fieldText: All Homes validation has validated successfully

fields.name: FY_House_Counts
fields.fieldText: WARNING: The number of homes in this batch exceeds 50% of the total number of homes to be delivered in the Financial Year

fields.name: DisplaySocialHomes10Percent
fields.fieldText: ERROR: The number of social housing homes in this batch exceeds the allowance for this project

fields.name: ErrorMessage
fields.fieldText: This Batch no longer has a status of submitted please refresh your browser

fields.name: RejectedMeasureSpendText
fields.fieldText: I'm sorry, this batch cannot be approved as there are associated custom measure spend records that require approval or have been rejected.

textTemplates.name: txtAverageMeasurePriceLimitsValidated
textTemplates.text: All Average Measure Price Limits have validated correctly

textTemplates.name: txtWarningMeasurePriceLimit
textTemplates.text: WARNING: Average Measure Price Limit for {!Loop_batch_measure_spends.Measure_Type_Name__c} has been breached, limit of £{!Loop_batch_measure_spends.Property_Measure_Type_Average_Price__c} with an average spend of £{!Loop_batch_measure_spends.Average_Spend__c}
